topics.title: Text Corpora & Normalization
subtopics: Text corpus, documents, tokenizations
Stemming (Porter vs Lancaster) vs Lemmatization POS tags
Regex tokenization, stopword removal

topics.title: Statistical Tokenization
subtopics: Byte Pair Encoding (BPE) subword tokenization mechanics
WordPiece and SentencePiece subword tokenization algorithms

topics.title: POS Tagging & Named Entity Recognition
subtopics: Sequence labeling paradigms: POS tagging and Named Entity Recognition (NER)
Transition and emission probabilities in Hidden Markov Models (HMM)

topics.title: Topic Modeling
subtopics: Latent Dirichlet Allocation (LDA) mathematical framework
Dirichlet priors and Gibbs sampling convergence

topics.title: Sentiment Analysis
subtopics: Lexicon-based sentiment analysis (VADER rules)
Classification sentiment analysis (Naive Bayes and Logistic Regression)

modules.name: Module 2: Vector Space Models, TF-IDF & Language Model Perplexities

topics.title: Bag of Words & N-Grams
subtopics: Bag of Words (BoW) occurrence representations
N-Gram count models, vocabulary bounds, and dimensionality limits

topics.title: TF-IDF Mathematics
subtopics: Term Frequency (TF) and Inverse Document Frequency (IDF) formulas
Sublinear scaling, normalization, and L2 norm scaling

topics.title: Vector Similarity Metrics
subtopics: Cosine Similarity equation derivation and bounds
Jaccard Similarity and Euclidean Distance comparisons

topics.title: N-Gram Language Models
subtopics: Maximum Likelihood Estimation (MLE) language models
Smoothing techniques: Laplace, Lidstone, and Kneser-Ney math

topics.title: Perplexity & Evaluation
subtopics: Perplexity evaluation equations from entropy
Word Error Rate (WER) metrics

modules.name: Module 3: Static Word Embeddings & Vector Space Modeling

topics.title: Word2Vec Framework
subtopics: Continuous Bag of Words (CBOW) vs Skip-Gram architectures
Linear projection layer representations

topics.title: Word2Vec Optimization
subtopics: Hierarchical Softmax Huffman tree path search
Negative Sampling objective functions

topics.title: Global Vectors (GloVe)
subtopics: Global word co-occurrence matrix math
Weighted least-squares objective function derivation

topics.title: FastText Subword Embeddings
subtopics: Subword n-gram representation math
Handling Out-of-Vocabulary (OOV) tokens

topics.title: Semantic Analogies
subtopics: Vector mathematics for analogies: king - man + woman = queen
Cosine similarity mapping in static semantic spaces

topics.title: Self-Attention Mechanics
subtopics: Query, Key, and Value vector projections
Scaled Dot-Product attention formula and d_k scaling justification

topics.title: Multi-Head Attention
subtopics: Parallel head projections and concatenated outputs
Output linear projection weight matrix

topics.title: Transformer Block Components
subtopics: Layer Normalization layouts: Pre-LN vs Post-LN stability
Position representations: Sinusoidal encodings vs Rotary Position Embeddings (RoPE)

topics.title: Causal Decoders & Cross-Attention
subtopics: Masked self-attention and causal attention masking
Cross-attention keys and values routing from encoder outputs

topics.title: Pre-training Objectives
subtopics: BERT Masked Language Modeling (MLM) and Next Sentence Prediction (NSP)
GPT Causal Language Modeling (CLM) autoregressive pre-training

modules.name: Module 5: Dense Retrieval, Vector Search & RAG Foundations

topics.title: Sentence Embeddings
subtopics: Bi-Encoder vs Cross-Encoder architectures
Cosine similarity fine-tuning with Contrastive Loss

topics.title: Information Retrieval & BM25
subtopics: Sparse retrieval: TF-IDF vs Okapi BM25 ranking metric
BM25 saturation and document length normalization scaling

topics.title: Vector Databases & Search
subtopics: Dense retrieval and embedding index search
Vector Database indexing: Hierarchical Navigable Small World (HNSW) and IVF-PQ quantization

topics.title: Hybrid Search
subtopics: Reciprocal Rank Fusion (RRF) ranking algorithm
Combining lexical (BM25) and semantic (dense vector) retrieval scores

topics.title: Summarization & Translation Metrics
subtopics: Extractive vs Abstractive summarization constraints
Translation evaluation: BLEU precision and ROUGE recall metrics
